---
name: New Question
about: Contribute a new question to the Architect AI question bank
title: "[Question]: "
labels: content, question
assignees: ""
---

## Question Metadata

- **Domain:** [1-5, e.g. 3]
- **Task Statement:** [e.g. "Evaluate caching strategies for distributed systems"]
- **Difficulty:** [foundation / intermediate / advanced]

## Question JSON

Paste the full question object below. Ensure it follows the standard schema.

```json
{
  "scenario": "",
  "question": "",
  "options": [
    { "id": "A", "text": "" },
    { "id": "B", "text": "" },
    { "id": "C", "text": "" },
    { "id": "D", "text": "" }
  ],
  "correctAnswer": "",
  "explanation": ""
}
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Question is original and not a duplicate
- [ ] All four options are plausible
- [ ] Explanation clearly justifies the correct answer
- [ ] British English spelling is used throughout
